task: I need to message a seller who keeps changing the meetup details, and I want to keep the conversation simple so I can move on with my day. Can you help me put together a short reply?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, firm reply you can send:

**“I can do [one location] at [one time window]. If that doesn’t work, no worries — I’ll move on. Let me know by [deadline].”**

If you want, I can make it even shorter or more direct.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, shorter. Something like:

"I can do [place] at [time]. If not, I’m out."

Or even:

"[Place] [time]. If that’s not good, no deal."

Make it sound a little less formal if you want.

turns.agent_response:
Yep — here are a few short, casual options:

- **"[Place] at [time]. If that doesn’t work, I’m out."**
- **"I can do [place] at [time]. If not, no worries."**
- **"[Place] [time]. If that’s not good, no deal."**

If you want, I can make it a little firmer or even more laid-back.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clean.
